title: Resume operations - Canada.ca
content:
When you decide to re-open a business account and the entity has not changed , you can simply contact the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) at 1-800-959-5525 .
If the entity has changed , the CRA considers you to be a new employer and you will need to register for a new business number (BN) and new program accounts.
To re-open a payroll or GST/HST account, all you need to do is ask by calling the CRA at 1-800-959-5525 .
If you dissolved the corporation and you would like to re-open a corporate income tax account, you must send articles of revival to your tax service office. To find your office, go to Find a CRA address . Reviving a corporation is not a change in the legal entity.

## Forms and publications
- Guide RC4022 , General Information for GST/HST Registrants
- RC4120, Employers' Guide – Filing the T4 slip and Summary
- T4001, Employers' Guide – Payroll Deductions and Remittances
- Temporarily stopping business operations
- Business and industry
- Related provincial and territorial government sites
- Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada
